nasb.text: Now therefore, do not let my lord the king take the report to heart, namely, ‘all the king’s sons are dead,’ for only Amnon is dead.”

esv.text: Now therefore let not my lord the king so take it to heart as to suppose that all the king’s sons are dead, for Amnon alone is dead.”

cnv.text: 現在我主我王不要把這事放在心上，以為王所有的兒子都死了。其實死的只有暗嫩一人。”

ccb.text: 所以，我主我王啊，不要相信这消息，不是所有的王子都死了，只有暗嫩一人死了。”
